Internal Legal & Compliance Note (UAE PDPL / SCA market conduct) — Gulf Dunes Utilities PJSC vendor onboarding and already-announced ADX process.
Scope: assess PDPL controls for KYC/contracting with Desert Falcon Capital Limited (ADGM Licence: LF-000000, placeholder) and confirm no MNPI handling in the workflow.
Data minimisation: procurement template currently requests [Full Name], [Family Origin], [Passport No], [Emirates ID], [IBAN], and [Residential Address]; only collect what is necessary for onboarding under UAE PDPL and DIFC/ADGM data rules.
One individual signatory will be verified; Emirates ID 784-1987-1234567-5 (checksum invalid noted) may be referenced in the KYC log without retaining a copy of the card.
Company identifiers: Desert Falcon Capital Limited trade licence TL-92-778899-01 (checksum invalid) and Tax Registration Number TRN-100000000000000 (placeholder) suffice for vendor due diligence.
Role contacts only: send queries to compliance@desertfalconcap.adgm.example and procurement@gulfdunesutilities.example; do not capture personal emails or private numbers.
For external confirmations, use public helplines such as SCA Contact Centre 800-120-0000 and DIFC Client Services +971-600-000000; no personal contacts should be recorded.
Market conduct: the issuer’s intention to pursue a secondary ADX listing and a tap of existing sukuk was publicly announced on 25 Jan 2025 via the company website and SCA disclosure portal; treat this as non-MNPI.
Prohibited handling: do not solicit family-origin details unless mandated by a specific sanction-screening alert; if the [Family Origin] field is blank, leave it blank.
Storage controls: Emirates ID numbers and passport copies, if received, must be redacted or hashed within 7 days; where possible, substitute with [ID reference on file].
Cross-jurisdiction note: contracts signed at ADGM are subject to ADGM DP Regulations 2021; cross-border transfers to hosting in UAE mainland require PDPL-compliant safeguards and transfer assessment.
Address hygiene: avoid storing full residential addresses; capture [City] and [Emirate] only, e.g., [Unit XX, Level XX, Al Noor Tower, Abu Dhabi], unless a tax invoice requires more detail.
Banking references should use vendor letterhead; do not record full account numbers in trackers; use [Bank Name] and [Last 4 digits] placeholders.
Escalation: any non-public issuer information beyond what is on the ADX/SCA portals must be treated as MNPI and not circulated; report to marketconduct@gulfdunesutilities.example.
